title: career-ops.pipeline.added v1
description: Emitted when a new job-posting URL is added to data/pipeline.md, the career-ops scan inbox. Producers today: job-search-se's POST /api/pipeline (manual dashboard add). career-ops's own scan.mjs is the primary bulk producer but does not yet call this — SYSTEM-layer script, out of job-search-se's direct-edit scope per DATA_CONTRACT.

url.description: Job posting URL added to the pipeline inbox.

source.description: How the URL entered the pipeline.
